subcodes.first_line: A remembrance from the Wronged One unto the Party of God throughout the land, that the choice wine of utterance may draw them unto the horizon of meanings [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ذکر من لدی المظلوم حزب الله فی البلاد لیجذبهم رحیق البیان الی افق المعانی
subcodes.subjects: @the Word of God; influence and centrality of, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @call to action, @rejection, opposition and persecution, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God, @chastisement and requital
